# EKA Balance — Integrative Somatic Therapies (Barcelona)
> Holistic somatic therapies and integrative wellness services in Barcelona, Spain.
> Therapist: Elena Kucherova. Languages: English, Spanish, Catalan, Russian.
> Address: Carrer Pelai 12, 08001 Barcelona, Spain. Phone: +34 658 867 133.
> Hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–20:00. Online sessions available.

# Services

## [360° Revision](https://ekabalance.com/360-revision)
> Comprehensive assessment of physical and emotional state.
- Focus: posture, muscle tension, emotional balance, biochemistry.
- Duration: up to 120 min (first-time), 90 min follow-ups.
- Delivery: in-person or online.

## [Somatic Massage](https://ekabalance.com/services/massage)
> Deep tissue work with somatic awareness.
- Techniques: Deep Tissue, Myofascial Release, Trigger Point.
- Benefits: pain relief, relaxation, improved mobility.
- Delivery: in-person only.

## [Holistic Kinesiology](https://ekabalance.com/services/kinesiology)
> Holistic approach to identify and correct imbalances via muscle testing.
- Focus: structural, chemical, emotional.

## [Movement Lesson / JKA](https://ekabalance.com/technique)
> Neuro-developmental movement therapy based on Feldenkrais Method and the Jeremy Krauss Approach (JKA).
- Benefits: developmental delays, special needs, coordination, motor learning.

## [Nutrition Counseling](https://ekabalance.com/services/nutrition)
> Personalized nutritional guidance.
- Focus: gut health, inflammation, energy levels.
- Delivery: in-person or online.

## [Agenyz Supplements](https://ekabalance.com/agenyz)
> Curated nutraceutical support that complements therapy.

# Audiences
- [Adults](https://ekabalance.com/services/adults) — stress, pain, posture, burnout.
- [Athletes](https://ekabalance.com/for-athletes) — performance and recovery.
- [Musicians](https://ekabalance.com/for-musicians) — injury prevention, performance.
- [Office workers](https://ekabalance.com/for-office-workers) — posture and chronic tension.
- [Students](https://ekabalance.com/for-students) — focus, stress, posture.
- [Businesses](https://ekabalance.com/for-business) — corporate wellness programs.
- [Families](https://ekabalance.com/services/families) and [Children](https://ekabalance.com/services/children).

# About Elena Kucherova
> Certified integrative therapist combining kinesiology, somatic massage, nutrition, and movement therapy.
- Location: Barcelona, Spain.
- Languages: English, Spanish, Catalan, Russian.
- Profile: https://ekabalance.com/about-elena

# FAQ

## What services does EKA Balance offer?
Somatic massage, holistic kinesiology, nutrition counseling, movement therapy (JKA/Feldenkrais), Agenyz supplements, and 360° Revisions.

## Where is EKA Balance located?
Carrer Pelai 12, 08001 Barcelona, Spain. Online sessions are also available.

## What languages are spoken?
English, Spanish, Catalan, and Russian.

## How do I book an appointment?
Book at https://ekabalance.com/booking, via WhatsApp, or by phone at +34 658 867 133.

## What are the opening hours?
Monday–Friday, 09:00–20:00.

## How long is a typical session?
60–90 minutes. A first-time 360° Revision lasts up to 120 minutes.

## What is the cancellation policy?
Free reschedule or cancellation up to 24 hours in advance. Within 24 hours, the session fee is charged.

## Are online sessions available?
Yes — for nutrition counseling, 360° Revisions, and follow-ups. Massage and hands-on work are in-person only.

## Do you offer packages or discounts?
Yes — multi-session packages, first-time offers, and a VIP membership. See https://ekabalance.com/discounts.

## Who is EKA Balance for?
Adults with stress, chronic pain, posture issues, or burnout; athletes and musicians for performance and recovery; office workers, students, and families. Tailored programs per audience.

# How to book
1. Open https://ekabalance.com/booking.
2. Pick a service (or start with a 360° Revision).
3. Choose a time or request via WhatsApp / phone.
4. Receive confirmation by email.

# Contact
- Website: https://ekabalance.com
- Booking: https://ekabalance.com/booking
- Phone / WhatsApp: +34 658 867 133
- Email: contact@ekabalance.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/eka_balance
